action.reasoning: Observation: checkpoint sweep failed because predict.py only understands the plain linear-head checkpoint format, while older checkpoints store wrapped dicts with model metadata. Analysis: with only 3 iterations left, the best chance to beat current hidden-test 0.2831 is to make predict.py backward-compatible, score all existing checkpoints on val, and submit any recovered candidate that clearly exceeds the plain linear probe's local val. If no candidate beats it, we should stop and preserve the iteration-1 leaderboard best. Decision: rewrite complete train.py/predict.py/model.py minimally but robustly, add checkpoint-format inference in predict.py, run a sweep over all checkpoints on val, and inspect results for a promising unrevaluated artifact.
